Descriptions.ShortDescription: Manage smart home switches (Shelly, Tasmota, HA, ESPHome) as native N.I.N.A. equipment.
Descriptions.LongDescription:
# Smart Switch Manager

Integrate your IoT power relays directly into your astrophotography workflow. Control equipment power manually or automate it via the Advanced Sequencer.

### ?? Supported Systems
* **Shelly:** Gen 1, Gen 2/3 (Plus & Pro) via HTTP/RPC APIs
* **Home Assistant:** Full integration via REST API & Long-Lived Access Tokens (LLAT)
* **Tasmota:** Control via the HTTP Command API
* **ESPHome:** Seamless integration via the web_server component

### ? Key Features
* **Native Equipment:** Appears directly in the **Equipment > Switch** tab.
* **Sequencer Ready:** Dedicated instructions to toggle power during your sequences.
* **Device Discovery:** Built-in scanners to find your Shelly and Tasmota devices on the network.

---

*For detailed setup and developer info, please visit the [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/DIYAstro-Obs/NINA.Plugin.SmartSwitchManager).*
